gist.headline: Going with the Flow
gist.blurb: FlowAI Bot just landed in the greenhouse! Built with TypeScript, it uses our API to automate workflows and sprinkle some creative automation into your data.
gist.summary: Added FlowAI Bot to the community showcase, a TypeScript-based tool for automating workflows and creative data enrichment.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use FlowAI Bot from the community apps directory to streamline their collaborative workflows.
gist.visual_concept: Represent FlowAI Bot as the recurring Monitor Robot, working collaboratively with Polly the bee to automate a workflow. They can be organizing glowing data blocks or watering a flowing stream of code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot working together to organize glowing data blocks on a conveyor belt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot working together to organize glowing data blocks on a conveyor belt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
